sentence: 这个社区的暴力犯罪率已经大幅下降。
pinyin: Zhège shèqū de bào lì fàn zuì lǜ yǐjīng dàfú xiàjiàng.
english: The violent crime rate in this community has dropped significantly.

meaning: to sing the original version of a song (as opposed to a cover version)
sentence: 她唱得比原唱还要好听。
pinyin: Tā chàng de bǐ yuán chàng hái yào hǎotīng.
english: She sings even better than the original artist.

sentence: 两国因地缘关系一直往来密切。
pinyin: Liǎng guó yīn dì yuán guānxi yīzhí wǎnglái mìqiē.
english: The two countries have always maintained close ties due to their geographic proximity.

sentence: 广电局出台了新的内容审核规定。
pinyin: Guǎng diàn jú chūtái le xīn de nèiróng shěnhé guīdìng.
english: The radio and television authority issued new content review regulations.

meaning: courseware (abbr. for 課程軟件|课程软件[ke4 cheng2 ruan3 jian4])
sentence: 老师把课件上传到了学校网站。
pinyin: Lǎoshī bǎ kè jiàn shàngchuán dào le xuéxiào wǎngzhàn.
english: The teacher uploaded the courseware to the school website.
